name: @aily-project/board-raspberrypi_pico2
description: The Raspberry Pi Pico 2 is a high-performance, low-cost microcontroller board built around the RP2350 chip, featuring a dual-core Arm Cortex-M33 processor clocked at up to 150 MHz, 520 KB of SRAM, and 4 MB of onboard flash memory. It also includes dual-core RISC-V Hazard3 processors as an alternative architecture. With 26 multi-function GPIO pins, support for SPI, I2C, UART, ADC, and PWM, along with enhanced security features and improved performance over its predecessor, the Pico 2 is ideal for a wide range of embedded and IoT applications in a compact, breadboard-friendly form factor.
author: RaspberryPi
